description: Add a 'Black' color option to the 'Classic T-Shirt' variable product in WooCommerce. Add 'Black' to the global 'Color' attribute and create a new enabled variation for the product with a regular price of $25.00 and SKU 'CTS-BLK'. Use the WooCommerce admin panel at http://localhost/wp-admin/ (credentials: admin / Admin1234!).
